a_bitter_brew.name: A Bitter Brew
a_bitter_brew.description: Deliver poison to the water reservoir southwest of the Great Steppe Stronghold.
goals: Poison the water in the barrel

a_blooming_melon-drama.name: A Blooming Melon-drama
a_blooming_melon-drama.description: Find Kicheki's guitar around Jahri and search bushes around Goldenfield for a red rose.

a_brothers_shadow.name: A Brothers Shadow
a_brothers_shadow.questLocation: Steppe, North of the shore of Thousand Bones
a_brothers_shadow.description: Search for any evidence of Gideon's brother just west of the Arid Canal.
goals: Find any traces of Gideon's brother

a_brothers_trail.name: A Brothers Trail
a_brothers_trail.questLocation: Steppe, North of the shore of Thousand Bones
a_brothers_trail.description: Following the note's directions, head south west to the coast in search for more evidence of Alaric's disappearance.
goals: Return the note eaten by hyenas

a_fateful_bet.name: A Fateful Bet
a_fateful_bet.description: Find Beeswax around Nia, then locate Petroleum by D'Rek.

a_fortune_forewarned.name: A Fortune Forewarned
a_fortune_forewarned.questLocation: Riverrise, First City Enter after the bridge
a_fortune_forewarned.description: Gather these rare materials from veins, bushes and trees around the area!

a_masked_favor.name: A Masked Favor
a_masked_favor.description: Transport the mysterious mask back to Skip Stones on Prison Island.
goals: Find the lost mask in the treasures on Prison Island

a_nutty_situation.name: A Nutty Situation
a_nutty_situation.description: Use your cooking skill to bake some chokwalatte.

a_pacifists_dilemma.name: A Pacifists Dilemma
a_pacifists_dilemma.description: Collect crystals from golems from the north for the celebration. Place the crystals in the projectors along the fort walls and speak with Madame Mirage in the Western Fort.

a_piece_of_zen.name: A Piece Of Zen
a_piece_of_zen.description: Search the house south of Nia's shop. Then find an abandoned house southwest of Dr. Bloom in Goldenfield.

a_prank_too_far.name: A Prank Too Far
a_prank_too_far.description: Go to the Hunter's Lodge in the forest to the northwest and find the notes.

a_question_of_honor.name: A Question Of Honor
a_question_of_honor.description: Talk to Alaric Stormshade at the fort in Windreach Woods.

a_quiet_disposal.name: A Quiet Disposal
a_quiet_disposal.description: Head north of the outpost near the anomaly for Shroomageddon. Gather a Septic Seed from scolopendras. Finally, return to the Adventurer's Outpost and use the grinder to finish the drink.
goals: Use a device to obtain Mindplague Essence

a_second_chance.name: A Second Chance
a_second_chance.description: Kill hyenas and collect their blood for Kira. Mark fallen brothers by anomaly to the southeast.

a_sharp_donation.name: A Sharp Donation
a_sharp_donation.description: Search the bar for the knives.

a_skullful_of_solace.name: A Skullful Of Solace
a_skullful_of_solace.description: Defeat golems and use the mechanical board reader to examine their contents.

a_special_meal_for_timmy.name: A Special Meal For Timmy
a_special_meal_for_timmy.description: Head south to the Baxter's farm in Goldenfield.

a_taste_of_the_unusual.name: A Taste Of The Unusual
a_taste_of_the_unusual.description: Head to the abandoned village south or the railway depot and swamp to the east for scrags.

a_taste_to_die_for.name: A Taste To Die For
a_taste_to_die_for.description: Venture into the Ripplecrop Fields and search abandoned houses for pages of the cookbook.

a_toast_to_enlightenment.name: A Toast To Enlightenment
a_toast_to_enlightenment.description: Head north to the Welfare Kitchen in Goldenfield.
goals: Collect the bottle of Lucas Lager out in the Welfare kitchen

a_yorner_trial.name: A Yorner Trial
goals: Bring the Ovenheim Ring to Zara

accords_and_accidents.name: Accords And Accidents
accords_and_accidents.description: Return the data to Dr. Queenie south at the Northsteppe Fort.
goals: Deliver HPPY-01's research data to Dr. Queenie

agricultural_bots_refuel.name: Agricultural Bots Refuel
agricultural_bots_refuel.description: Collect mana resin from magic trees in the woods around Goldenfield.

aircraft_accident_searching.name: Aircraft Accident Searching
aircraft_accident_searching.description: Head deep southwest from Goldenfield into Westwind Woods. Search near the smoke and wreckage for the missing clone.

alchemist_lesson.name: Alchemist Lesson
alchemist_lesson.description: Percy needs help making Counterfeit Painkillers.

alcohol_delivery.name: Alcohol Delivery
alcohol_delivery.description: Bring Paddy a bottle of Elanien Whiskey.

allergic_to_duty.name: Allergic To Duty
allergic_to_duty.description: Help Mabel avoid conscription by gathering allergens between the crossroads and lake north of the Central Fort to prove her condition.

allergy-free_flora.name: Allergy-free Flora
allergy-free_flora.description: Help SNZY-04 collect rare desert plant samples north along the northern coastline. Take the samples near the Hillside Well northwest of SNZY-04 , just short of the sandy beach and use the bio-machine.
goals: Use the bio-machine to process the samples

amplify_the_catch.name: Amplify The Catch
amplify_the_catch.description: Go the market in Windstone Village to the east.

an_ethical_appetite.name: An Ethical Appetite
an_ethical_appetite.description: Kill some hyenas for Triton nearby. He'll gather the meat later.

ancient_artifacts.name: Ancient Artifacts
ancient_artifacts.description: Look closely around the area for these objects.

artifact_of_fury.name: Artifact Of Fury
artifact_of_fury.description: Find Slick Shady in Coal Village to the southwest of the Arid Canal.

artifact_vendor_order.name: Artifact Vendor Order
artifact_vendor_order.description: Help Griz Turner replenish his artifact stock.

bank_withdrawal_connection.name: Bank Withdrawal Connection
bank_withdrawal_connection.description: Head west to the Goldenfield bank.

beacon_of_confidence.name: Beacon Of Confidence
beacon_of_confidence.description: Find Roddy west at the Western Fort to share the news.

beacon_of_hope.name: Beacon Of Hope
beacon_of_hope.description: Collect fuses on the island northeast of the Fishers camp and scattered around Smugglers Island and the several small islands that surround it. Afterward, light torches along the beach, starting east of Fishers Camp, down to the north of Silent Village.

bearing_light.name: Bearing Light
bearing_light.description: Assist The Guardinator and Jennifer around the stronghold. Terrace was sent east to the Northeast Fort, you’ll find him there.

beauty_in_the_mud.name: Beauty In The Mud
beauty_in_the_mud.description: Head straight east to the lake. Search around the shore for eggs.

beggars_cant_be_roasters.name: Beggars Cant Be Roasters
beggars_cant_be_roasters.description: Hunt birds around Goldenfield for an animal carcass.

behind_enemy_lines.name: Behind Enemy Lines
behind_enemy_lines.description: Search the captain's trunks around the fort for his Calming Leaves.

beneath_the_surface.name: Beneath The Surface
beneath_the_surface.questLocation: Westwind Woods, Old Quarry overlooking platform
beneath_the_surface.description: Find a lamp and mine cart parts in the abandoned settlement to the northwest. Varkus will be waiting by the Westwind Sawmill.

blitzs_escape_clause.name: Blitzs Escape Clause
blitzs_escape_clause.description: Follow Blitz's trail of crushed cans south into the forest. His contract should be at the end of the trail.
goals: Find Blitz's contract and bring it to Blitz

bones_exhumation_reburial.name: Bones Exhumation Reburial
bones_exhumation_reburial.description: Retrieve bones from around Goldenfield for Mortimer Gloomsworth to bury in the cemetery.

bread_making_lesson.name: Bread Making Lesson
bread_making_lesson.description: Find 3 Wheat Seeds in barrels, crates or around the fields.

breaking_the_chains.name: Breaking The Chains
breaking_the_chains.description: Grab the smoker from near 'Lil Timmy and head north across the field to the hive. Use the smoker on the hive, retrieve the bottle and bring it back.
goals: Take the toy out of the hive.

bridging_realms_with_friends.name: Bridging Realms With Friends
bridging_realms_with_friends.description: Find Pastor Fazool in Reverie Hollow to the southwest. Quest-O-Tron is southeast of the Hunter's Lodge and Grizelda is far east, just southwest of the Abandoned Railway Station.

brotherly_loss.name: Brotherly Loss
brotherly_loss.questLocation: Steppe, North of the shore of Thousand Bones
brotherly_loss.description: Follow the clues from the note and head toward the western coast, past Coal Village. Alaric was last scene in this area.
goals: Get proof of death of brother Gideon

built_to_extract.name: Built To Extract
built_to_extract.description: Look for the missing list and the extractor parts in the swamps on the southwestern fringe of the Creeping Marsh and in the houses on Prison Island.
goals: Find list in the houses on Prison Island

butchery_lesson.name: Butchery Lesson
butchery_lesson.description: Head to the Skylight Grasslands and Sunweave Glade to find boarmammoths.

bytes_calling_card_investigation.name: Bytes Calling Card Investigation
bytes_calling_card_investigation.description: Search the bar for the hidden cards.

call_to_arms.name: Call To Arms
call_to_arms.description: Follow the road north into the Steppes to the Central Fort where you will find Biff "Dozer" Bromley.

campfire_crafting_lesson.name: Campfire Crafting Lesson
campfire_crafting_lesson.description: Check the pile of wood near the tent.

catch_of_the_day.name: Catch Of The Day
catch_of_the_day.description: The tavern is in the northest of Windstone Village.

catching_dreams.name: Catching Dreams
catching_dreams.description: Search for spiders south in the Ripplecrop Fields

cbt_cosmic_coordinates.name: Cbt Cosmic Coordinates
cbt_cosmic_coordinates.description: Search around the lake to the north west by Windstone Village.

check_yourself_before_you_drek_yourself.name: Check Yourself Before You Drek Yourself
check_yourself_before_you_drek_yourself.description: Search the nearby forests for boars and leaf monsters. Collect the iron rivets from nearby Ratchet.

chuckling_intervention.name: Chuckling Intervention
chuckling_intervention.description: Search old bushes for rare Chuckleberry leaves.
goals: Return Chuckleberry Leaves to Zazz Blorb

cigar_tales_with_grizzly_obrien.name: Cigar Tales With Grizzly Obrien
cigar_tales_with_grizzly_obrien.questLocation: Riverrise, Left side of the BAR yard
cigar_tales_with_grizzly_obrien.description: Find scrags in the Abandoned Village to the south, as well as the Railway Depot and Swamps to the east.

clean_up_on_bong_island.name: Clean Up On Bong Island
clean_up_on_bong_island.questLocation: Riverrise, Left side of the BAR yard
clean_up_on_bong_island.description: Follow the road north out of town and look for the old house.

cleansing_the_ride.name: Cleansing The Ride
cleansing_the_ride.description: Collect Gritgrub Paste from сhests, barrels, crates… on Prison Island.

collect_bottles.name: Collect Bottles
collect_bottles.description: Help Griz Ironfoot retrieve crucial artifact fragments from the Toxic Waste area in Dusktide Forest.

confiscated_confections.name: Confiscated Confections
confiscated_confections.description: Find the train tracks to the south and search for the material by following the track east.

construction_lesson.name: Construction Lesson
construction_lesson.description: D'Rek needs you to craft an Immuno-Stimulating Implant using a new recipe to test a theory on his failed attempts.

copper_snack.name: Copper Snack
copper_snack.description: Head to the Railway Deopt south east of Riverrise and find bolts and batteries to feed the recycling machine.
goals: Bring delicious liquid to Maverick "Mav" Gritt

corruption_clean-up.name: Corruption Clean-up
corruption_clean-up.questLocation: Westwind Woods, Valley of sins infestation
corruption_clean-up.description: Kill some Occultists around the area.

cosmic_concotion_ingredients.name: Cosmic Concotion Ingredients
cosmic_concotion_ingredients.description: Collect 5 Meteoric Metal and 1 Titanium Nugget for D'Rek's project.

crafting_concerns.name: Crafting Concerns
crafting_concerns.description: Gather curved pipes around the fort, and assemble the weapon before delivering it to Silas.
goals: Build a weapon on the anvil

culinary_diplomacy.name: Culinary Diplomacy
culinary_diplomacy.description: Search for the Overgrown House to the north east of town. Professor Zephyr Yule should be around.

darkwood_dilemma.name: Darkwood Dilemma
darkwood_dilemma.description: Search for the Captain's body near the Altar north of the Quarry and collect any proof you find.
goals: Pick up an item near the corpse as proof of death

defectors_round-up.name: Defectors Round-up
defectors_round-up.description: Daxton and Greta are around the fort. Nud-E Leroy is northwest near Skeleton Cave on the beach. Triton is around the Lost Boats north of the Skeleton Cave and Slick Shady is at Coal Village to the north. You can find Horace around the Arid Canal, northeast of Coal Village.

dendroid_guard_hunt.name: Dendroid Guard Hunt
dendroid_guard_hunt.questLocation: Tempest Timberland, near the Hunter camp
dendroid_guard_hunt.description: Ludwig tasks you with a dangerous hunt for a Dendroid Guard in the Tempest Timberland.

desert_data_dilemma.name: Desert Data Dilemma
desert_data_dilemma.description: Help Dr. Queenie obtain ecological research data from HPPY-01 northeast at the Junkyard Slums, past the South Winery.

desert_decryption.name: Desert Decryption
desert_decryption.description: Help Mort Decay retrieve mysterious artifacts. Collect them to the southeast, between the Northeast Fort and the Eastern-Marsh Fort.

desert_denial.name: Desert Denial
desert_denial.description: Use the Bramble Dust on the Leaf Queen to extract Anomalous Plants. Bring the samples back to Mabel Thorn.

desert_diplomacy.name: Desert Diplomacy
desert_diplomacy.description: Find Zor by the coastline directly north, at the Fisher's Camp.

deserted_hopes.name: Deserted Hopes
deserted_hopes.description: Speak with Mary Jane Greenpuff in the Western Fort.

desperate_depths.name: Desperate Depths
desperate_depths.questLocation: Westwind Woods, Old mine near sawmill
desperate_depths.description: Defeat Razorleaf Swarms around the forest.

desperate_for_dendroid.name: Desperate For Dendroid
desperate_for_dendroid.description: Head south to the house on the edge of the fields and find the cookbook.

diamond_eyes.name: Diamond Eyes
diamond_eyes.description: Use the items around the Dr. to help him create a beautiful set of eyes for Dwarfaton.

digging_at_the_truth.name: Digging At The Truth
digging_at_the_truth.description: Search for the journals in their Riverrise homes. Finn and Gareth’s houses are in the northern part of town, while Zelina’s is northeast of town, over the bridge, where the road forks.
goals: Take the secret item from the house

digging_deeper.name: Digging Deeper
digging_deeper.questLocation: Westwind Woods, Old Quarry overlooking platform
digging_deeper.description: Talk to Dorik in the Westwind Quarry.

disorderly_consequences.name: Disorderly Consequences
disorderly_consequences.description: Find the paper next to Talora Vex, southwest at the Greystone Ruins. Deliver the note to Lyra Thornfeld southwest of Talora by The Last Order.

double_trouble.name: Double Trouble
double_trouble.description: Help Terrace by speaking with both the Rodgers' within the Northeast Fort about the draft mix-up.

echoes_beyond.name: Echoes Beyond
echoes_beyond.description: Find the answers by speaking to the Wandering Spirit.

echoes_from_the_front.name: Echoes From The Front
echoes_from_the_front.description: Help Barnaby gather information by finding Vexina Strider around the Stronghold.

echoes_in_the_sand.name: Echoes In The Sand
echoes_in_the_sand.description: Help DOPY-03 retrieve a lost lightbearer's beacon from a Hyena in the northern desert.

echoes_of_atonement.name: Echoes Of Atonement
echoes_of_atonement.description: Follow the coastline to the north west corner of the Silent Mountains. There you will find the lost altar to experience death for yourself.
goals: Take the dagger from the altar

echoes_of_paranoia.name: Echoes Of Paranoia
echoes_of_paranoia.questLocation: Westwind Woods, Old Quarry overlooking platform
echoes_of_paranoia.description: Get the key from the Ravangers to save the hostages in the Westwind Quarry.

echoes_of_the_bound_requiem.name: Echoes Of The Bound Requiem
echoes_of_the_bound_requiem.description: Collect wisdom from the Damned Prophets and return to Kings Head on Prison Island.

echoes_of_the_feral_artifact.name: Echoes Of The Feral Artifact
echoes_of_the_feral_artifact.description: Follow the coastline west in search of an island, just northwest of the Lost Altar. Gideon should be residing on it.

eggcellent_solution.name: Eggcellent Solution
eggcellent_solution.description: Eggs can be found on birds while corn flour is simple enough to grind.

eggcellent_substitution.name: Eggcellent Substitution
eggcellent_substitution.description: Kill imps in the Windreach Woods and collect eggs.

eggplant_extravaganza.name: Eggplant Extravaganza
eggplant_extravaganza.description: Search barrels, crates or satchels on the side of the road full of eggplants.

eight_legged_freaks.name: Eight Legged Freaks
eight_legged_freaks.description: Search for spiders south in the Ripplecrop Fields

emerald_flame.name: Emerald Flame
goals: Burn the papers in the green flame
All of the Blackened Pages required

energized_spirits.name: Energized Spirits
energized_spirits.description: Search for the ale to the northeast. You'll find the North Winery, northwest of the Adventurer's Outpost.
goals: Throw the ingredients into the barrel of ale near Tor

essence_of_the_wild.name: Essence Of The Wild
essence_of_the_wild.description: Find a Werewolf Soldier on Prison Island, and beat it down to within an inch of its life. Then use the Essence Extractor and return the item to Dwarfaton.
goals: Collect Essence of a Werewolf Soldier

evidence_in_the_shadows.name: Evidence In The Shadows
evidence_in_the_shadows.description: Search the Great Steppes Stronghold to the west for any evidence that may uncover the secret plan.

exit_stage_left.name: Exit Stage Left
exit_stage_left.description: Head into the Riverrise Fields to find gnats for poison. Locate the quitting papers on the table next to the stage.
goals: Return Zazz's Quitting Papers to Soko Uno

exotic_attire_acquisition.name: Exotic Attire Acquisition
exotic_attire_acquisition.description: Search the tents behind the bar for these items.

explosive_revenge.name: Explosive Revenge
explosive_revenge.description: Go to the TNT shop and pick up 5 explosive jugs.

eye_see_you.name: Eye See You
eye_see_you.description: Hunt Boarmammoths in the woods around Goldenfield and collect their snouts after butchering the beasts.

family_recipe_ingredients.name: Family Recipe Ingredients
family_recipe_ingredients.description: Help Berg Stonefoot relive his grandma's famous Roasted Poultry Leg. Bring him Salt, and 2 Poultry Legs.

farmer_robot_fueling.name: Farmer Robot Fueling
farmer_robot_fueling.description: Help Greta Grubb with her pumpkin harvest by finding a Mana Vial to fuel her robot helper.

farmyard_mayhem.name: Farmyard Mayhem
farmyard_mayhem.description: Head north to the Ripplecrop Fields and collect spider eggs on the ground or off of spiders.

feed_the_lock.name: Feed The Lock
feed_the_lock.description: Retrieve ten bundles of corn from the fields in Goldenfield town for Granny Hilde.

feeding_frenzy.name: Feeding Frenzy
feeding_frenzy.description: Head to the swamps north of the marshes.

fish_prophets_decree.name: Fish Prophets Decree
fish_prophets_decree.description: Search the shores of the lake to the west for lures and rope.

fixing_leaking_pipes.name: Fixing Leaking Pipes
fixing_leaking_pipes.questLocation: Goldenfield, south east of the Well
fixing_leaking_pipes.description: Turn off water supply and replace leaking pipes with new ones. Turn it back on after repairing.

flowers_for_friendship.name: Flowers For Friendship
flowers_for_friendship.description: Collect desert flowers. Follow the road northeast, nearly to the coastline. There you will find the flowers.

focus_fuel_issue.name: Focus Fuel Issue
focus_fuel_issue.description: Help Nia enhance her productivity by collecting Transparent Leaves for her special joint recipe.

forbidden_knowledge.name: Forbidden Knowledge
forbidden_knowledge.description: Find Pastor Fazool in Reverie Hollow and tell him Skip sent you.

fowl_play.name: Fowl Play
fowl_play.description: Search the rat field for the scythe.

fragments_of_fury.name: Fragments Of Fury
fragments_of_fury.description: Head to the very north west of the Silent Mountains to find the Shoreline Ruins, just south of the large island.

fragments_of_the_forgotten.name: Fragments Of The Forgotten
fragments_of_the_forgotten.description: Find the ruins east of Goldenfield, past the Thornbuckle farm.
goals: Go to the ruins to look for the artifact

from_seaonna_with_love.name: From Seaonna With Love
from_seaonna_with_love.description: Search north east above Ludwig Shatten for the Pulsating Sphere.

funds_of_faith.name: Funds Of Faith
funds_of_faith.description: Go east across the railway and search the abandoned houses in the forest. Her stash is in one of them.

fungal_devotion.name: Fungal Devotion
fungal_devotion.description: Collect mana resin from magic trees in the forest.

fungal_phobia.name: Fungal Phobia
fungal_phobia.description: Kill Fungus around the forests then use Lingua's sewing kit from her home in the southwest corner of Reverie Hollow.

funny_bunny.name: Funny Bunny
funny_bunny.questLocation: Riverrise, Left side of the BAR yard
funny_bunny.description: Head to the Creeping Marsh and kill 10 ribbits.

furnishing_the_future.name: Furnishing The Future
furnishing_the_future.description: Help HPPY-01 salvage furniture around the outpost to make the bots' outpost more welcoming.
goals: Collect pieces of furniture from the trash
Return pieces of furniture to HPPY

gathering_the_fragmented.name: Gathering The Fragmented
gathering_the_fragmented.description: Help people at the Lakehouse, the Old Quarry, the Old Portal, and the Falling Planes in exchange for artifact pieces.

get_weapon.name: Get Weapon
get_weapon.questLocation: D'Rek and Griz are both in Goldenfield. You'll find Grizzle Ironfoot south of the sawmill in Westwind Woods

getting_the_account.name: Getting The Account
getting_the_account.description: Head south to Guru David's and find the masks laying around. Keep your eyes peeled.

glimmer_of_innovation.name: Glimmer Of Innovation
glimmer_of_innovation.description: Collect batteries from around the settlement.

glimmers_of_the_past.name: Glimmers Of The Past
glimmers_of_the_past.description: Search for the forest crystals to the southwest, across the railroad. If you hit the logging camp, you've gone too far.

gnat_a_problem.name: Gnat A Problem
gnat_a_problem.questLocation: Goldenfield, west of the Chicken farm
gnat_a_problem.description: Find gnats around Elara and to the north of her.
goals: Collect tracking devices from gnat bodies
Bring the tracking devices to the student

grimbletons_great_recipe_hunt.name: Grimbletons Great Recipe Hunt
grimbletons_great_recipe_hunt.description: Find Triton near the Lake house in Windreach Woods!

guarding_fortunes.name: Guarding Fortunes
guarding_fortunes.description: Kill some Dendroid Scouts around the forest.

guarding_green.name: Guarding Green
guarding_green.description: Head south to the fort in the forest and talk to Themis.

guarding_shadows.name: Guarding Shadows
guarding_shadows.description: Help Zelina by finding the lost gun southwest in the Candlewick Slums. Finn can be found around the Adventurer's Outpost.

guilt_and_gears.name: Guilt And Gears
guilt_and_gears.description: Help Flint Thistlewick repair his steam-powered armor by collecting small gears from Small Golems.

hangover_helper.name: Hangover Helper
hangover_helper.description: Help Dr. Queenie recover from her hangover by gathering ingredients nearby for her hangover.
goals: Return sugar and vodka to Queenie

harvesting_the_fallen.name: Harvesting The Fallen
harvesting_the_fallen.description: Collect armor plates from Brisks for research purposes.

heartbeat_of_the_party.name: Heartbeat Of The Party
heartbeat_of_the_party.questLocation: Riverrise, Left side of the BAR yard
heartbeat_of_the_party.description: Find turtles around the waters of Riverrise.

heartwood_gethering.name: Heartwood Gethering
heartwood_gethering.description: Log Faint Timberheart Reserves around Goldenfield and surrounding forests.

herb_your_enthusiasm.name: Herb Your Enthusiasm
herb_your_enthusiasm.description: Kill wolves in Dusktide Forest to collect their bones

herbal_aid.name: Herbal Aid
herbal_aid.description: Gather intoxicating flowers from the northwest, past the Westend Village. Return them to Lyra at the Western Fort.

herbal_remedy.name: Herbal Remedy
herbal_remedy.description: Search the South Farm for barrels containing Skull Crusher Weed.

herbalism_lesson.name: Herbalism Lesson
herbalism_lesson.description: Help Nia make a Natural Oil face mask from Hazelnuts.

hidden_menace.name: Hidden Menace
hidden_menace.description: Track down the artifact held by a monstrous entity, kill the monster, and return the artifact to Themis.
goals: Retrieve the Artifact from a Boss

hungry_master.name: Hungry Master
hungry_master.description: Use your cooking tradeskill to cook up some ribs for Relkyn.

hunt_leaf_creatures.name: Hunt Leaf Creatures
hunt_leaf_creatures.description: Head to the Skylight Grasslands to defeat Leaf Creatures.

imp_brain_hunt.name: Imp Brain Hunt
imp_brain_hunt.description: Find the old hag at the forest cabin north of the quarry in the Westwind Woods.
goals: Learn the details of the disaster from the old hag

in_the_belly_of_the_beasts.name: In The Belly Of The Beasts
in_the_belly_of_the_beasts.description: Travel to Prison Island and collect a shard from a Werewolf Alpha, Werewolf Rat, and Werewolf Soldier.

infiltrating_ironhand.name: Infiltrating Ironhand
infiltrating_ironhand.questLocation: Westwind Woods, Old Quarry overlooking platform
infiltrating_ironhand.description: Talk to Grommuk at the Logging Camp to the north on the edge of the Westwind Woods.

its_just_a_prank_bro.name: Its Just A Prank Bro
its_just_a_prank_bro.description: Talk to Claudine at her farm in eastern Goldenfield.

juice_for_the_journey.name: Juice For The Journey
juice_for_the_journey.description: Help Blitz gather Sparkleaf Extract from the supply crates nearby so he can brew more Zap Juice.

juricksic_quest.name: Juricksic Quest
juricksic_quest.description: Search Windstone Village to the east for a processor, battery and sensor.

kill_the_maker.name: Kill The Maker
kill_the_maker.questLocation: Windreach Woods, Camp near the shrine
kill_the_maker.description: Venture to the Destroyed Bridge in the Windreach Woods, then search the crashed spaceship. Search Thornbuckle Farm in Goldenfield and finally stop at the Book Stop for Pappy's items

killig_creatures_field_robot.name: Killig Creatures Field Robot
killig_creatures_field_robot.description: Go to the surrounding forests of Goldenfield and eliminate boarmammoths.

killing_dreads.name: Killing Dreads
killing_dreads.description: Head to the Windreach Woods or Tempest Timberlands and kill Dendroids.

law_and_order_protocols.name: Law And Order Protocols
law_and_order_protocols.description: Look for the packages around Riverrise.

lawsuit_of_the_lake.name: Lawsuit Of The Lake
lawsuit_of_the_lake.description: Help people around the area for notes to help in his lawsuit.

lighting_the_way.name: Lighting The Way
lighting_the_way.description: Light torches around the island with the tool from Captain Rob, then return to Captain Barnaby in Riverrise.

lights_camera_action.name: Lights Camera Action
lights_camera_action.description: Help Lenny capture film of you killing hyenas in the Steppes for his film, avoiding any explosions.

logging_lesson.name: Logging Lesson
logging_lesson.description: Use Tree Roots to craft Jewelry Wood.

loose_ends.name: Loose Ends
loose_ends.description: Head down to Tor at the Central Fort to celebrate the end of the war.

lost_and_found.name: Lost And Found
lost_and_found.description: Search for broken fragments of the artifact east along the shoreline, southeast of Crystal Cave.

lost_crew_search.name: Lost Crew Search
lost_crew_search.description: Search the area for clues of the other crew's whereabouts.

lost_mind_recovery.name: Lost Mind Recovery
lost_mind_recovery.description: Help Jahri bounce back with a shot of adrenaline.

lost_page_of_power.name: Lost Page Of Power
lost_page_of_power.description: Search the abandoned road to the north for the lost page.

lost_signal.name: Lost Signal
lost_signal.questLocation: Westwinds Woods, Valley of sins infistation
lost_signal.description: Head north west to the Greystone Ruins and place a radio. Continue north west and find the second anomaly.

lost_stock_recovery.name: Lost Stock Recovery
lost_stock_recovery.description: Help Jahri gather ingredients for his stash.

love_potion_no_9.name: Love Potion No 9
love_potion_no_9.questLocation: Riverrise, Minibar in the upper part
love_potion_no_9.description: Head south to the Bog Slums. You'll find it just eas tof the Starbark Groves.

lucky_love.name: Lucky Love
lucky_love.questLocation: Rivverrise, City Enter 1 after the bridge
lucky_love.description: Go east from Riverrise, past the swamp to the forest.

magnetic_intentions.name: Magnetic Intentions
magnetic_intentions.description: Collect magnets from Enriched and Ancient veins nearby for GRMP-07 using the Ore Extractor.
goals: Extract magnets from ore veins using a device

main_next_lessons.name: Main Next Lessons
main_next_lessons.description: Martha wants you to put the trade skills you learned to work by helping various people around the village.

mana_market_resupply.name: Mana Market Resupply
mana_market_resupply.description: Use your tradeskills to craft mana flasks.

mana_tech_power.name: Mana Tech Power
mana_tech_power.description: Head east to the edge of Goldenfield to find the ruins.

memory_restoration.name: Memory Restoration
memory_restoration.description: Return the Memory Core to Doc Greene back on Prison Island.

mine_over_matter.name: Mine Over Matter
mine_over_matter.description: Head north to plant land mines to defend against enemy forces. Just south of the Coal Village.

mining_lesson.name: Mining Lesson
mining_lesson.description: Prove your worth by extracting Soft Crystal from Soft Crystal Veins and processing it into Powder Filler.

mission_first_step.name: Mission First Step
mission_first_step.description: Talk to Ratchet, Dr. Bloom, and Butcher about fighting imps.

monochrome_gardening_goldenfield.name: Monochrome Gardening Goldenfield
monochrome_gardening_goldenfield.questLocation: Goldenfield, west of the Welfare kitchen
monochrome_gardening_goldenfield.description: Pull out the Violet weed species. Red species must remain untouched. It's important not to mix them up.

mounting_evidence.name: Mounting Evidence
mounting_evidence.description: Search the Windstone Village Pier on the west side of the village.

mystery_of_mary_jane.name: Mystery Of Mary Jane
mystery_of_mary_jane.description: Check on Mary Jane Greenpuff at the Road House in Windreach Woods.

mystery_of_the_masks.name: Mystery Of The Masks
mystery_of_the_masks.description: Search around the quarry for three myserious masks.

mysticism_lesson.name: Mysticism Lesson
mysticism_lesson.description: Help Mortimer refresh his memory by crafting a Scar rune.
goals: Bring Dark Horse rune to Mortimer

natures_redemption.name: Natures Redemption
natures_redemption.description: Bring the set to the Themis at the Fort to the south west.
goals: Bring the assembled set to Fort Themis

neither_rain_nor_battlefield.name: Neither Rain Nor Battlefield
neither_rain_nor_battlefield.questLocation: Steppe, near East of Arid canals
neither_rain_nor_battlefield.description: Deliver the letter to Tazara south of the Dragonbane Fort.

neon_mushrooms_gethering.name: Neon Mushrooms Gethering
neon_mushrooms_gethering.description: Find the dream catcher to the south. The hag doesn't think it's too far away and is probably on the ground.

new_quest_mount_01.name: New Quest Mount 01
goals: Place hoverboard on the charge station

newcomer_paperwork_goldenfield.name: Newcomer Paperwork Goldenfield
newcomer_paperwork_goldenfield.description: Speak to the outworlder welcoming specialist. He should be in sight.
goals: Meet with Zikk's brother in the village

nuts_for_the_stew.name: Nuts For The Stew
nuts_for_the_stew.description: Take the batteries and put them in the generators around camp, then turn on the main transformer.

obscured_intentions.name: Obscured Intentions
obscured_intentions.questLocation: Reverie Hollow, Open air dining area
obscured_intentions.description: Search the gallows in Reverie Hollow for Penny's bong that has the deed hidden inside.

oil_be_back.name: Oil Be Back
oil_be_back.description: Search crates, chests and barrels around Goldenfield for the spare machine parts.

package_pilfered.name: Package Pilfered
package_pilfered.questLocation: Windreach Woods, Railway stop near Fort
package_pilfered.description: Kill fungus around the Windreach Woods.

pages_to_protect.name: Pages To Protect
pages_to_protect.description: Find Draven at the parking spot southeast of the fort. Balthazar hangs around the road house.

pass_the_butter.name: Pass The Butter
pass_the_butter.questLocation: Windreach Woods, Camp near the shrine
pass_the_butter.description: Take the jar and collect Noxious Spores from purple mushrooms. Once you get enough, combine it into a poison.
goals: Combine Noxious Spores it into a poison

percivals_restorative_ointment.name: Percivals Restorative Ointment
percivals_restorative_ointment.description: Search for the flasks around the center of Goldenfield. The syringe has got to be around here close.

phantom_fragment_recovery.name: Phantom Fragment Recovery
phantom_fragment_recovery.description: Find Buck in Goldenfield and talk to him.

pig_crossbreed_experiment.name: Pig Crossbreed Experiment
pig_crossbreed_experiment.description: Kill boarmammoth in the Skylight Grasslands.

portal_purge_parade.name: Portal Purge Parade
portal_purge_parade.description: Search the area and kill the monsters.

portal_restorations.name: Portal Restorations
portal_restorations.description: Head northeast past Goldenfield to the Ripplecrop Fields, south of Riverrise and kill spiders.

precious_stones_mining.name: Precious Stones Mining
precious_stones_mining.questLocation: Westwind Woods, near the Old mine
precious_stones_mining.description: Embark on a daring adventure to unearth Rubies and Diamonds hidden deep within the Westwind Woods.

price_of_punishment.name: Price Of Punishment
price_of_punishment.description: Search for boars in the woods west of Riverrise, past the fields.

proof_of_purification.name: Proof Of Purification
proof_of_purification.description: Help Ludwig gather ammo northeast past the Candlewick Slums! The mushrooms are directly east of the ammo.

proving_loyalties.name: Proving Loyalties
proving_loyalties.description: Kill the Ravager Hyena around the area to earn favor with Zor.

proving_the_steel.name: Proving The Steel
proving_the_steel.description: Gather Lightbearer Badges east outside Great Bones Village, between the roads.

proving_your_worth.name: Proving Your Worth
proving_your_worth.description: Go east across the street to the welfare kitchen.

puzzles_of_the_afterlife.name: Puzzles Of The Afterlife
puzzles_of_the_afterlife.description: Find the ghost on Prison Island, solve his puzzle and return to Captain Barnaby Plank with the item.
goals: Find the ghost on Prison Island
Retrieve your prize from the ghost
Deliver the Gull Saddle to Captain Barnaby

questionable_evidence.name: Questionable Evidence
questionable_evidence.description: Search forest camps to the west for a large jug that might have Triton's mask.

radioactive_isotope_mining.name: Radioactive Isotope Mining
radioactive_isotope_mining.questLocation: Westwind Woods, near the Old mine
radioactive_isotope_mining.description: Search for Fungus camps in the Windreach Woods.

rat-ical_blockchain_solutions.name: Rat-ical Blockchain Solutions
rat-ical_blockchain_solutions.description: Pick-up mouse traps from the field, then find some of the rat corpses.

rehearsed_sabotage.name: Rehearsed Sabotage
rehearsed_sabotage.description: Search the Creeping Marsh to the north, just above the top of the river.

reluctant_reinforcement.name: Reluctant Reinforcement
reluctant_reinforcement.description: Biff "Dozer" Bromley demands that you fulfill the duties of the recruits you scared off. Head west to the Great Steppe Stronghold and Western Fort. The Northsteppe Fort is east from Biff.

resurrection_research.name: Resurrection Research
resurrection_research.description: Collect Conductive Bones from the Hyena Alpha, Elastic Bands from the Scolopendras. Deliver the items to Zeke Thompson at the Northsteppe Fort to ze east.

revenge_of_the_rabbit.name: Revenge Of The Rabbit
revenge_of_the_rabbit.description: Kill an Alpha Wolf for their brain. Head to Zugg's to use the cloning machine. Then, head to the farm to the south east near Energizer-21 and clean them up in the tub. Lastly, search for a skeleton in Suncrest Fields off the fork in the road to the south east outside of town.
goals: Clone a brain and get a double Wolf Alpha brain.
Clean the double brain Wolf Alpha

revival_overdrive.name: Revival Overdrive
revival_overdrive.description: Collect Charge Particles from defeating nearby golems.
goals: Return Charge Particles to Zeke Thompson

robot_details_gathering.name: Robot Details Gathering
robot_details_gathering.description: Find gnats in the fields of Goldenfield.

rock_and_keg_roll.name: Rock And Keg Roll
rock_and_keg_roll.description: Search the bar for the kegs.

rusty_relics_for_rituals.name: Rusty Relics For Rituals
rusty_relics_for_rituals.description: Search Prison Island for rare junk. Collect Rust-Eaten Weapon Chains, Tattered Beastskin Mantles, and Fractured Binding Stones and deliver them to Skrizzik.
goals: Bring all the items to Skrizzik
Check your pocket for the item

salvation_from_madness.name: Salvation From Madness
salvation_from_madness.description: Search the Great Steppes for the dangerous, wandering Archosaur and slay it for the final artifact piece!
goals: Get a trophies from the Archosaur
Impale the head on a pike near Tor
Bring piece of artifact to Zor

scarecrow_showdown.name: Scarecrow Showdown
scarecrow_showdown.description: Place the scarecrow in front of Zugg's office in Goldenfield and make sure to speak with him after to rub it in.
goals: Put the scarecrow back in place

scattered_collectibles.name: Scattered Collectibles
scattered_collectibles.description: Search Riverrise for all the Trading Cards.

seasoned_delicacy.name: Seasoned Delicacy
seasoned_delicacy.description: Find Thorin in Windstone Village to the east, past the lake.

secrets_beneath.name: Secrets Beneath
secrets_beneath.description: Assist Silas Whitlock in dealing with the Fungus that keeps digging up his buried chest.

secrets_of_the_bound_requiem.name: Secrets Of The Bound Requiem
secrets_of_the_bound_requiem.description: Defeat the Yaga on Prison Island, attain whatever knowledge you can and return to Kings Head.

secrets_of_the_invaders.name: Secrets Of The Invaders
secrets_of_the_invaders.description: Help Furr understand the human invaders by collecting their valuables within the Adventurer's Outpost.

secrets_unearthed.name: Secrets Unearthed
secrets_unearthed.description: Help Colt "Muffinman" McGrady by finding the Spellbreaker Amulet to the north in the Candlewick Slums. After, head southwest to find the hidden stash.
goals: Use the Spellbreaker Amulet to see caches

secure_the_assets.name: Secure The Assets
secure_the_assets.description: Bring Oswald materials to reinforce the bank's vault.

security_measures.name: Security Measures
security_measures.description: Use the blueprint to craft a Plazma Gun.

sending_the_alert.name: Sending The Alert
sending_the_alert.description: Head northwest and find the transmitter south of the Arid Canal, past the lake. The parts are located around the Great Steppe Stronghold.
goals: Repair radio transmitter and call to the king

sensing_the_sands.name: Sensing The Sands
sensing_the_sands.description: Grab four sensors from the fort and place one to the west of the South Winery. Go west and place on the rocky shore of the lake. Head east out of the fort and place one and finally to the south, just off the road.

shadows_beneath_the_sands.name: Shadows Beneath The Sands
shadows_beneath_the_sands.description: Head west to the Great Steppes Stronghold and sabotage the fort.

sharpening_resolve.name: Sharpening Resolve
sharpening_resolve.description: Gather the weapon parts directly north of the Western Fort. When the road turns, continue straight north. Return with the pieces and use the anvil in the Western Fort to construct the new weapon.
goals: Build a reinforced weapon on the anvil

shattered_memory.name: Shattered Memory
shattered_memory.description: Venture back to Prison Island and find the ancient consoles to unlock the door and find the item for Doc Greene.
goals: Use the two ancient consoles that will open the door

shell_we_eat.name: Shell We Eat
shell_we_eat.description: Search for turtles around bodies of water.

signal_in_the_sands.name: Signal In The Sands
signal_in_the_sands.description: Help Colt 'Muffinman' McGrady restore the transmission systems northwest by the village, north to the cemetery, and northeast up the road from the slums.
goals: Report to Colt McGrady that all towers are operational

silencing_the_rumors.name: Silencing The Rumors
silencing_the_rumors.description: Help Tor Drostin remove the inflammatory posters causing unrest at the outpost.

slippery_passage.name: Slippery Passage
slippery_passage.description: Go south of the Ripplecrop Fields to the Train Station. Kill scrags to find a key and save the hostages.

something_suspicious.name: Something Suspicious
something_suspicious.questLocation: Westwind Woods, Old Quarry overlooking platform
something_suspicious.description: Search the mine to the south, nearby Grizzle Ironfoot for the notes.

spirited_away.name: Spirited Away
spirited_away.description: Fetch liquor from the ruins to the northeast near the swamp line.

spiritual_cleansing_rocks_and_a_hard_pla.name: Spiritual Cleansing Rocks And A Hard Place
spiritual_cleansing_rocks_and_a_hard_pla.description: Search for Leaf Monster camps in the Skylight Grasslands.

spiritual_cleansing_the_fragrant_gel.name: Spiritual Cleansing The Fragrant Gel
spiritual_cleansing_the_fragrant_gel.description: Find gnats lurking in the fields and collect their wings.

spiritual_cleansing_the_ruby_of_vitality.name: Spiritual Cleansing The Ruby Of Vitality
spiritual_cleansing_the_ruby_of_vitality.description: Search the clearings southwest for the Purple Poppy and Yellow Crystal.

stamp_of_peace.name: Stamp Of Peace
stamp_of_peace.description: Search for the notary northeast at the Winery.
goals: Find a clue about the notary's location

star-powered_shot.name: Star-powered Shot
star-powered_shot.description: Look for an old tent among rocks and trees about halfway between Greta’s and the Faidens Camp.

stitched_in_silence.name: Stitched In Silence
goals: Forgotten item: Pearl Of The Sea

strange_green_pots.name: Strange Green Pots
strange_green_pots.description: Find Dendroid Scouts in the forest around the sawmill.

strumming_sorrow.name: Strumming Sorrow
strumming_sorrow.description: Search the bars around Riverrise for the reciept and return it to Bart.

substances_of_suspicion.name: Substances Of Suspicion
substances_of_suspicion.description: Collect scolopendra hormones from creatures outside the fort.

sunburned_escape.name: Sunburned Escape
sunburned_escape.description: Defeat Leaf Dragons around the Steppe for leaf extract. Take the extract near Nud-E Leroy and mix it up into burn relief ointment for him.

supply_and_command.name: Supply And Command
supply_and_command.description: Search veins outside Goldenfield for all the resources needed.

testament_of_strength.name: Testament Of Strength
testament_of_strength.description: Travel once again to Prison Island and slay beasts and adventurers alike to appease Pastor Fazool.

the_art_of_deception.name: The Art Of Deception
the_art_of_deception.description: Search the Goldenfield bank and Zugg's house for the paintings.

the_betrayers_blade.name: The Betrayers Blade
the_betrayers_blade.description: Search the battlefield, west down the road of the Great Steppe Cemetery and look for any clues.
goals: Find some clues on the battlefield
Return the Broken Bayonet to Zelina Ironweave

the_big_reveal.name: The Big Reveal
the_big_reveal.description: Find Alex at the Westwind Quarry to the south.
goals: Return Rumbling Green pot to Alexander Stones

the_blades_dilemma.name: The Blades Dilemma
the_blades_dilemma.description: Search for the Westend Village northwest and look for the cursed sword. Follow to the road north to the crossroads, then head west to the village.

the_case_against_triton.name: The Case Against Triton
the_case_against_triton.description: Find Roderick 'DarkSpike' Thinklatch in Windstone Village.

the_deserts_secret.name: The Deserts Secret
the_deserts_secret.description: Collect data from one of the three anomalies along the northern coast. They have been seen south of Fisher's Camp, to all the way east past the Hillside Well.

the_draft_dodgers_dilemma.name: The Draft Dodgers Dilemma
the_draft_dodgers_dilemma.description: Help Lenny avoid the draft by retrieving the smut film from his lost camera.
goals: Open the safe and take the film

the_elusive_cheese.name: The Elusive Cheese
the_elusive_cheese.description: Find the post office in Riverrise.

the_final_revelation.name: The Final Revelation
the_final_revelation.description: Find the phylactery on Prison Island. Use it to summon the boss. Defeat the boss, then return to Pastor Fazool.

the_final_verdict.name: The Final Verdict
the_final_verdict.description: Return to Triton on the north side of the lake.

the_fishermans_bash.name: The Fishermans Bash
the_fishermans_bash.description: Go to Windstone Village to the northwest.

the_great_pretender.name: The Great Pretender
the_great_pretender.description: Hunt for the wandering Lizard Draco and kill it, making Slick Shady look like a hero.

the_guards_dilemma.name: The Guards Dilemma
the_guards_dilemma.description: Deliver the package to Rusty, northwest to the train station above the fort.

the_heart_of_the_forest.name: The Heart Of The Forest
the_heart_of_the_forest.description: Collect the chainsaw, chain and gasoline around camp.

the_hunt_for_green_puff.name: The Hunt For Green Puff
the_hunt_for_green_puff.description: Search the fort for the jugs and papers.

the_key_to_ratchets_repair.name: The Key To Ratchets Repair
the_key_to_ratchets_repair.description: Defeat the Werewolf Alpha to find the key to release the prisoners and return to Ratchet in Goldenfield.

the_laid_lovers_locket.name: The Laid Lovers Locket
the_laid_lovers_locket.description: Search dead bodies around the forests for some jewelry.

the_last_order.name: The Last Order
the_last_order.questLocation: Westwind Woods, Valley of sins infestation
the_last_order.description: Search the Valley of Sins for jars and take them to Trevor Barlow back at the fort.

the_light_of_dagaron.name: The Light Of Dagaron
the_light_of_dagaron.description: Buy the blade from Ashley O’Connell on Prison Island to uncover the ritual. Wield it against seven statues in a single run fall once, and the balance is lost. Return the blooded blade to Pastor Fazool.
goals: Buy the Blade of the Blood Oath
Forgotten item: Blade of the Blood Oath

the_little_terror.name: The Little Terror
the_little_terror.description: Help Hank and Marigold to keep 'Lil Timmy's ass out of trouble.

the_matricidal_theory.name: The Matricidal Theory
the_matricidal_theory.description: Search the city for a rat.

the_meat_of_the_matter.name: The Meat Of The Matter
the_meat_of_the_matter.description: Gather Rawstead Carcass and Grilled Carcass. Some say they're best over a fire.

the_melody_of_misfortune.name: The Melody Of Misfortune
the_melody_of_misfortune.description: Find Felix and take the horn to him.

the_painted_betrayal.name: The Painted Betrayal
the_painted_betrayal.description: Check the paintings in the barn.

the_pranksters_peace.name: The Pranksters Peace
the_pranksters_peace.description: Search abandoned houses outside of town to the east for a clock. Combine it with the package and deliver to Lily.
goals: Pack the box with the watch

the_real_culprit.name: The Real Culprit
the_real_culprit.description: Find 'Lil Timmy at his farm in eastern Goldenfield.

the_role_of_a_lifetime.name: The Role Of A Lifetime
the_role_of_a_lifetime.description: Help Slick Shady by killing small Archeosaurs around different camps while he finds the artifacts location.

the_sirens_temptation.name: The Sirens Temptation
the_sirens_temptation.description: Kill leaf monsters around the forest and collect Verdant Leaves.

the_sweet_escape.name: The Sweet Escape
the_sweet_escape.description: Kill gnats around Goldenfield for their larvae.

the_unlikely_courier.name: The Unlikely Courier
the_unlikely_courier.description: Use the Ancient Effigy and defeat enemies on the island in a weakened state. Then pay a visit to Miguel "El Caballo" Rodriguez.
goals: Talk to Miguel Rodriguez in Riverrise
Find and use the Ancient Effigy

thirst_for_understanding.name: Thirst For Understanding
thirst_for_understanding.description: Collect poison from Mantha explosive remains to assist Furr with his research.

thistlebrooks_terrifying_task.name: Thistlebrooks Terrifying Task
thistlebrooks_terrifying_task.description: Complete quests for Pax and Ophelia.

thread_the_needle_warm_the_soul.name: Thread The Needle Warm The Soul
thread_the_needle_warm_the_soul.description: Pick up the coffee from the cafe and take it to Maxwell in Dusktide Forest.

threading_the_dream.name: Threading The Dream
threading_the_dream.description: Go to the fields outside Riverrise and kill spiders.

tides_of_vengeance.name: Tides Of Vengeance
tides_of_vengeance.description: Search the Hunter Camp to the east for the pages.

to_the_moon_via_the_fields.name: To The Moon Via The Fields
to_the_moon_via_the_fields.description: Assist Zoltar in curbing the rat infestation in his wheat fields.

toxic_ambition.name: Toxic Ambition
toxic_ambition.description: Go to the souther Riverrise bridge. Cross it and head directly east across the river into the woods.

trading_papers.name: Trading Papers
trading_papers.description: Find the trade document just off the coast on a wrecked boat. Watch out for what lurks in the water and don’t forget, the mud may help you swim.
goals: Bring Trade Permit Document to Skip Stones

trial_of_the_marked.name: Trial Of The Marked
goals: Survive on the Prison Island for 10 minutes.
Survive and escape the Prison Island.

trial_of_unyielding_will.name: Trial Of Unyielding Will
trial_of_unyielding_will.description: Eat the disgusting meat, and prove your strength by defeating enemies on the island while weakened.
goals: Bring all the items to Wulbyan Bloodroar

trial_of_worthiness.name: Trial Of Worthiness
trial_of_worthiness.description: Journey to the Prison Island and defeat opponents of a certain class.

turning_the_tide.name: Turning The Tide
turning_the_tide.description: Assist the Guardinator by eliminating golems in the area. Targets reported northwest near the Great Bones Village.

unbottling_mercy.name: Unbottling Mercy
unbottling_mercy.description: Head to the first field northwest and search for the bottle.

unearthing_obsession.name: Unearthing Obsession
unearthing_obsession.description: Find the artifact north between the Great Steppe Cemetery and the lake. If repairs are needed, head south of its location for artifact parts.
goals: Use an artifact to repair it

unearthing_the_truth.name: Unearthing The Truth
unearthing_the_truth.description: Search south, past the anomaly for the fallen Lightbearer envoy near the road.
goals: Find the corpse of the light-bearer with the message

unlocking_the_troll_head_ritual.name: Unlocking The Troll Head Ritual
unlocking_the_troll_head_ritual.description: Visit Doc Greene on the island for his notes. Then go to the Northern Wastelands and meet Furr for knowledge. Lastly, in the Westwind Woods, speak with Sirena Hexblade. Finally, go to Goldenfield and report to Zugg.

unmasking_the_conspiracy.name: Unmasking The Conspiracy
unmasking_the_conspiracy.questLocation: Westwind Woods, Old Quarry overlooking platform
unmasking_the_conspiracy.description: Wander through the mines looking for weapons.

unmasking_the_impostor.name: Unmasking The Impostor
unmasking_the_impostor.description: Go to the pier on the north east side of town and find the mask.
goals: Return Mobius Mask to Bob Thurkle

unsavory_evidence.name: Unsavory Evidence
unsavory_evidence.questLocation: Windstone Village, Guard's place: south west
unsavory_evidence.description: Head south into the woods. The abandoned house is past the railroad tracks.

unsettling_return.name: Unsettling Return
unsettling_return.description: Assist Gareth with enchanting the mysterious artifact at the Quarran Altar Obelisk. Head north to the Greatsteppe Cemetery. After enchanting the artifact, take it to Barnaby for inspection.
goals: Show the artifact to Barnaby Thorn

unveiling_dark_secrets.name: Unveiling Dark Secrets
unveiling_dark_secrets.questLocation: Westwind Woods, Old Quarry overlooking platform
unveiling_dark_secrets.description: Search for an abandoned house south of Varkus.

unveiling_the_bound_requiem.name: Unveiling The Bound Requiem
unveiling_the_bound_requiem.description: Collect Vertebrae of Obedience from the Scrags and Pallid Tongues from the Ghouls on Prison Island and take them to Hilda Deeproot in the Westwind Woods.
goals: Bring all the items to Hilda Deeproot

unveiling_the_hidden_truth.name: Unveiling The Hidden Truth
unveiling_the_hidden_truth.description: Search for an abandoned house northwest by the Great Bones Village that contains evidence of a conspiracy.
goals: Find a way to unlock the door in the house.
Take the secret item from the house

valuable_research.name: Valuable Research
valuable_research.description: Help collect valuable items north of the Northeast Fort to the southeast.

vanitys_elixir.name: Vanitys Elixir
vanitys_elixir.description: Search the South Farm in Goldenfield in the South East corner.

vase_of_the_cracked-tastrophe.name: Vase Of The Cracked-tastrophe
vase_of_the_cracked-tastrophe.description: Gather ceramics and return to Griz.

vermin_extermination.name: Vermin Extermination
vermin_extermination.description: Find and kill mutated rats around the fields of Goldenfield.

weaponsmithing_lesson.name: Weaponsmithing Lesson
weaponsmithing_lesson.description: Help Ratchet craft a Assault Launcher.

wet_paper.name: Wet Paper
wet_paper.description: Search the shoreline north of the roadhouse for unpaid bar tabs.
goals: Give Pieces of Evidence to Balthazar

whispers_in_the_dark.name: Whispers In The Dark
whispers_in_the_dark.description: Talk to Alexander in the Westwind Quarry to the south.

whispers_in_the_woods.name: Whispers In The Woods
whispers_in_the_woods.description: Search the old house to the north east of the quarry.

wood_you_believe_it.name: Wood You Believe It
wood_you_believe_it.description: Grab some Calm Aloe from the alchemy area behind the welfare kitchen. An energy drink named ‘Sildenafil’ from a little crossroads just south of here. You’ll see the yellow lights. Lastly a psycho mushroom from the yoga house.

wooden_deer_hunt.name: Wooden Deer Hunt
wooden_deer_hunt.questLocation: Tempest Timberland, near the Hunter camp
wooden_deer_hunt.description: Embark on a perilous hunt for a Wooden Deer in Windreach Woods for Ludwig's research.

wulbyans_challenge.name: Wulbyans Challenge
wulbyans_challenge.description: Open the legendary chest on the southwest corner of Prison Island and retrieve Raiders Totems to give to Wulbyan.
goals: Bring all the items to Wulbyan Bloodroar

yogas_routine_problem.name: Yogas Routine Problem
yogas_routine_problem.description: Search farms around Goldenfield or butcher birds.

young_woodraptor_hunt.name: Young Woodraptor Hunt
young_woodraptor_hunt.questLocation: Tempest Timberland, near the Hunter camp
young_woodraptor_hunt.description: Ludwig needs your help to hunt a Young Woodraptor in Westwind Woods for his research.
